data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of issuing a certificate upon completion with 80% attendance. While the linked use case mentions that Sarah completed the course with 80% attendance, there is no concrete evidence of an API or mechanism that confirms the issuance of a certificate based on this attendance. The evidence primarily focuses on attendance tracking and individual bookings, failing to demonstrate the specific requirement of certificate issuance, leading to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence of an API or mechanism for issuing a certificate based on attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define certificate issuance endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a certificate is issued when attendance criteria are met.
